RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants S.N. Sands Corporation dba S&S Trucking and Scott Patrick's motion to strike portions of Plaintiff's complaint is granted. (see word mintues for complete details) Counsel for defendant is to submit form of order that is verbtim to the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.
